name: config_run
short_description: Configure individual program options for a run
full_help:
config_run

Description: 
Configure individual program options for a run

Syntax: 
config_run  [-quiet] [-verbose] <run> <program> <option> <value>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <run>       Run to modify
  <program>   Name of the program to set an option for
  <option>    Name of option to set
  <value>     Value of the argument to set for the option

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
